# CinemaAI Monorepo Scaffold — Heuristic Draft (v0.4)

> ⚠️ **Heuristic mode**: Generated from PRD narrative only — *no technical inputs provided*. All structural decisions are inferred from domain scope (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), not implementation contracts. This is a *neutral, stack-agnostic scaffold* intended for immediate upstream validation and input enrichment.

## 🧩 Scaffold Summary
| Layer | Decision | Evidence Source | Status |
|--------|----------|------------------|--------|
| **Monorepo Topology** | `pnpm workspace` + `nx`-style domain-driven layout (recommended for AI/media tooling with polyglot service boundaries) | PRD mentions "multi-agent orchestration", "real-time rendering pipeline", "LLM + VLM + audio synthesis co-inference" → implies heterogeneous runtimes & strict domain isolation | `inferred[PRD.v0.4 §3.1, §5.2]` |
| **Root Structure** | `./apps/`, `./libs/`, `./tools/`, `./shared/`, `./infra/` | Standard Nx convention; aligns with PRD’s separation of "user-facing apps" (e.g., Studio UI, Script Editor), "reusable domain libs" (e.g., scene-graph, shot-composition, voice-cloning-sdk), and "infra glue" (e.g., media-cache, render-queue, idempotent-webhook-gateway) | `inferred[PRD.v0.4 §2.3, §4.7]` |
| **Domain Packages** | 15 packages mirroring PRD modules: `@cinemaai/studio-ui`, `@cinemaai/script-engine`, `@cinemaai/scene-graph`, `@cinemaai/shot-composer`, `@cinemaai/voice-cloner`, `@cinemaai/face-animator`, `@cinemaai/audio-synthesizer`, `@cinemaai/video-renderer`, `@cinemaai/llm-orchestrator`, `@cinemaai/vlm-annotator`, `@cinemaai/media-catalog`, `@cinemaai/project-manager`, `@cinemaai/audit-trail`, `@cinemaai/idempotency-gateway`, `@cinemaai/usage-metering` | Direct 1:1 mapping from PRD Module Index (v0.4 Table 1) — e.g., "Module 7: Face Animator" → `@cinemaai/face-animator` | `inferred[PRD.v0.4 Appendix A]` |
| **Cross-Cutting Anchors** | Pre-declared reactive anchors in `libs/shared/events`: `SceneGraphUpdated`, `ShotRendered`, `VoiceCloned`, `IdempotencyKeyResolved`, `AuditTrailRecorded` | PRD mandates event-driven coordination across modules (§4.4 "Event Mesh Requirements") and explicit audit + idempotency non-functional goals (§6.2, §6.5) | `inferred[PRD.v0.4 §4.4, §6.2, §6.5]` |
| **Tech Stack Adapter** | Neutral scaffolding: TypeScript-first core, with `// @platform:python` / `// @platform:rust` / `// @platform:cuda` hints in relevant libs (e.g., `video-renderer` hints CUDA, `llm-orchestrator` hints Python) | PRD explicitly lists mixed-stack execution targets (§5.3: "Python inference backends", §5.5: "Rust-based real-time audio DSP", §5.7: "CUDA-accelerated rendering kernels") | `inferred[PRD.v0.4 §5.3, §5.5, §5.7]` |
| **CI/CD Skeleton** | `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (lint/test on push), `.github/workflows/release.yml` (semantic-release + nx affected), `./infra/pulumi/` (IaC stubs for AWS/GCP media pipelines) | PRD requires "zero-downtime canary deployments" (§7.1) and "multi-cloud media asset routing" (§7.4) | `inferred[PRD.v0.4 §7.1, §7.4]` |

## 📁 Filesystem Layout (Draft)
```
./
├── apps/
│   ├── studio-ui/          # Next.js + Tailwind + WebGPU
│   ├── script-editor/      # Monaco-based TS editor + LSP
│   └── mobile-app/         # React Native (future phase)
├── libs/
│   ├── shared/
│   │   ├── events/         # Reactive event anchors (v2.3 compliant)
│   │   ├── types/          # Shared DTOs, zod schemas, OpenAPI fragments
│   │   └── utils/          # Idempotency key gen, audit context builder
│   ├── studio-ui/
│   ├── script-engine/      # Rule-based script DSL + AST interpreter
│   ├── scene-graph/        # JSON-LD + WebGL-compatible graph model
│   ├── shot-composer/      # Timeline + layer + transition engine
│   ├── voice-cloner/       # Python subprocess wrapper + gRPC adapter
│   ├── face-animator/      # Rust WASM module + Canvas renderer
│   ├── audio-synthesizer/  # Web Audio API + offline render queue
│   ├── video-renderer/     # FFmpeg.wasm + CUDA kernel bindings
│   ├── llm-orchestrator/   # LangChain + custom adapters for anime-gen models
│   ├── vlm-annotator/      # CLIP + SAM + anime-specific fine-tunes
│   ├── media-catalog/      # Media asset metadata + vector search index
│   ├── project-manager/    # ACID project state sync (CRDT-backed)
│   ├── audit-trail/        # Immutable log + Merkle tree root export
│   ├── idempotency-gateway/# Redis-backed dedupe + retry policy engine
│   └── usage-metering/     # Prometheus metrics + billing event emitter
├── tools/
│   ├── nx-plugins/         # Custom generators for "scene", "shot", "voice-model"
│   └── prd-sync/           # PRD-to-code-comment sync CLI (auto-annotates // @prd-ref)
├── infra/
│   ├── pulumi/
│   │   ├── aws-media-pipeline/
│   │   └── gcp-render-farm/
│   └── docker/
├── shared-codegen-enums.yaml  # Loaded per skill spec
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
├── nx.json
├── tsconfig.base.json
└── README.md
```

## ⚙️ Cross-Cutting Infrastructure Defaults (Pending Validation)
| Concern | Default Choice | Rationale | Input Gap |
|---------|----------------|-----------|-----------|
| **Logging** | Structured JSON + OpenTelemetry trace context propagation | Required for distributed tracing across LLM/VLM/audio/video services | `missing: 安全风险分析.md` |
| **Tracing** | Jaeger-compatible OTLP exporter, sampled at 1% baseline | PRD §6.3 mandates "end-to-end latency observability for <500ms user actions" | `missing: 并发控制建议.md` |
| **Auth** | OAuth2.1 + PKCE for UI, mTLS for inter-service | PRD §6.4 requires "zero-trust service mesh" and "SAML/OIDC enterprise SSO" | `missing: 安全风险分析.md` |
| **Idempotency** | `IdempotencyKeyResolved` event + Redis SETNX + TTL | PRD §6.5 specifies "exactly-once execution for shot rendering & voice cloning" | `missing: 幂等设计建议.md` |
| **Audit** | Append-only SQLite WAL + daily Merkle root export to IPFS | PRD §6.2 requires "immutable, verifiable, exportable audit trail" | `missing: 安全风险分析.md` |
| **Rate Limiting** | Token bucket per `X-User-ID` + `X-Project-ID`, enforced at gateway | PRD §7.2 defines "tiered usage quotas per creator account" | `missing: 并发控制建议.md` |
| **Circuit Breaker** | Resilience4j-style state machine per external dependency (e.g., HuggingFace, RunPod) | PRD §4.6 notes "unstable third-party inference endpoints" | `missing: 并发控制建议.md` |

## 📝 Next Steps (For Upstream Validation)
1. ✅ **Confirm stack declaration**: Provide one of: `pom.xml`, `package.json`, `pyproject.toml`, or `go.mod` → unlocks framework-specific scaffolding.
2. ✅ **Supply minimum inputs**: `技术方案分析.md` (to confirm layer responsibilities) + `接口意图清单.csv` (to generate controllers/endpoints).
3. ✅ **Validate domain package names**: Are `@cinemaai/face-animator`, `@cinemaai/vlm-annotator`, etc., aligned with your naming convention?
4. ✅ **Review cross-cutting defaults**: Flag any mismatch with security, compliance, or infra constraints.

> 🔗 **Sibling handoff note**: This scaffold emits `scaffold_contract` compatible with `N200 code-generation` (for controller/service stubs) and `N210 test-scaffolding` (for Jest/Vitest + Pytest stubs). All event anchors (`SceneGraphUpdated`, etc.) conform to `N190.v2.3 reactive-event` spec.
